//mumax 3.12 [windows_amd64 go1.26.0(gc) CUDA-12.9]
//commit hash: 6e5c98bb
//CPU info: Unknown, Error: exec: "wmic": executable file not found in %PATH%
//GPU info: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5070 Ti(16302MB), CUDA Driver 13.1, cc=12.0, using cc=120 PTX
//OS  info: Windows OS, Hostname: nachjs-pc1
//Timestamp: 2026-07-09 14:15:08
//(c) Arne Vansteenkiste, Dynamat LAB, Ghent University, Belgium
//This is free software without any warranty. See license.txt
//********************************************************************//
//  If you use mumax in any work or publication,                      //
//  we kindly ask you to cite the references in references.bib        //
//********************************************************************//
//output directory: CoFeB_VCMA_Hc_Scan.out/
SetGridSize(128, 128, 1)
SetCellSize(3e-9, 3e-9, 1.5e-9)
Msat = 1.0e6
Aex = 15e-12
alpha = 0.02
anisU = vector(0, 0, 1)
Dind = 0.06e-3
TableAdd(Ku1)
TableAdd(B_ext)
N := (0.73e6 - 0.5e6) / 4
for i := 0; i < 5; i++ {
	print("Step ", i, " of 5: Ku1 = ", 0.73e6-i*N)
	Ku1 = 0.73e6 - i*N
	B_ext = vector(0, 0, 0)
	Relax()
	for j := 0; j < 10; j++ {
		Bz := 0.001 + j*0.0002
		B_ext = vector(0, 0, Bz)
		Minimize()
		TableSave()
		SaveAs(m, sprintf("Ku1_%03d_B_%03d", i, j))
		print("Ku1=", Ku1, " B=", Bz, " mz=", m.average())
	}
}
//Step  0  of 5: Ku1 =  730000
//Ku1= 730000  B= 0.001  mz= [0.005471551790833473 -0.0006505516939796507 0.4037858843803406]
//Ku1= 730000  B= 0.0012000000000000001  mz= [0.00539100356400013 -0.0002590866351965815 0.4517875015735626]
